English/Arabic Tours

Exclusive Deals

Evening Desert Safari

89 AED | $24 | €22

6 Hours / 1 Person

  • Pick up & Drop Off (Dubai & Sharjah)
  • Dune Bashing (Desert Safari) 4x4
  • Belly Dance
  • Tanoura Show
  • Fire Show
  • Sand Boarding
  • Short Camel Ride
  • Henna Tatto for Ladies (Mehndi)
  • Tea, Water, Soft Drinks (Unlimited)
  • Starter Serverd At 6:00 Pm
  • BBQ Buffet Dinner (Veg & Non Veg)
  • Sunset Photography
  • Kids Up-to 3 Years Free
  • Toilet Facilities M & F (Separate)
  • No Hidden Charges

Extras

  • Quad Bike:- Single Seat AED 150
  • Quad Bike:- Double Seat AED 250
  • VIP Service (Sofa Seating & Waiter Service) AED 50 / Person
Book Now

199 AED | $26 | €26

6 Hours / 1 Person

  • Quad Bike Single Seat
  • Dune Bashing In Land Cruiser

  • Unlimited Soft Drinks
  • Arabic Costumes For Pictures.
  • Henna Painting For Ladies
  • Smoking Area Access

  • Tanura Show
  • Fire Shows
  • 2 Belly Dance Shows.
  • Drop Off time around 9:30

Experience the Magic of the Desert

Dive into our captivating video highlights showcasing the thrill of the evening desert safari. Witness breathtaking landscapes, exhilarating dune bashing, and unforgettable moments under the starlit sky!
